collection.title: The Economist
collection.subtitle: March 7-13, 2026 Issue
collection.author: The Economist Editorial Team
collection.description: Weekly news magazine covering current affairs, business, finance, and culture

notes.content: Cover story: A WAR WITHOUT A STRATEGY. Feature on Anthropic AI risk - US government labeling it national security threat.

collection.title: 宇宙的邊界到底在哪裡？
collection.subtitle: Beyond the Edge of the Universe
collection.author: Unknown
collection.description: 天文學科普書 - 從星座到重力波，揭開天文學如何影響文明、時間與人生觀

notes.content: Key insight: 黑洞不是終點，而是我們與星空之間的開端 (Black holes are not the end, but the beginning of our connection with the stars)

collection.title: AI 时代，说故事
collection.subtitle: The Perfect Story: How to Tell Stories that Inform, Influence, and Inspire
collection.author: Karen Eber
collection.description: 故事教练、TED 讲者分享說故事技巧 - AI 時代的關鍵生存力

notes.content: Goodreads: 3.90/5 stars. Endorsed by Adam Grant, Daniel Pink, Susan Cain, Malcolm Gladwell, James Clear. Focus: storytelling as survival skill in AI era.

collection.title: 藝術有什麼 － 天價與無價之間
collection.subtitle: What is Art - Between Sky-High Prices and Priceless
collection.author: 伍常
collection.description: 探討藝術的真正價值，啟發讀者獨立思考藝術與市場的關係

notes.content: 誠品書店暢銷榜。Endorsed by 潘源良 (HK lyricist). Explores creator's inner struggles and pursuit of pure art.

collection.title: 天地與音樂的多重變奏
collection.subtitle: Metamorphosis of Heaven, Earth & Music
collection.author: 柯英嘉 (Inge Kloepfer) / 意公子
collection.description: 音樂家周善祥 Kit Armstrong 的傳記 - 從神童到成熟藝術家的成長歷程

notes.content: Biography of Kit Armstrong (周善祥). Features his mastery of Liszt's rhythmic variations. Deep Taiwan connections.
